rationale: The cited paper appears methodologically and substantively close to the citing study: both model marketing interventions with latent/hidden customer relationship states and separate short-term vs long-term effects (citing note: hidden buyer-seller states and ROMI decomposition; cited note: latent financial states with instantaneous/advertising/educational effects). Given this strong overlap and the confirmed DOI-level match (10.1509/jmkr.48.4.683), this is not an obvious incidental mention and merits full relation judgment.
